name: Public Copy Boundary Framework v1
approved_hero_headline: Truth is no longer the first layer. Evidence is.
approved_subheadline: Hoax.ai helps people read evidence risk in the synthetic media age — without issuing verdicts, scores, uploads, or fake/real labels.
allowed_public_language: maps evidence risk manually and conceptually
helps people ask better evidence questions
detector_misreading_prevention: what Hoax.ai is not boundary section
no scoring or verdict output language
manual reference utility not automated classifier
non_authorization_statement: Sprint 83 authorizes public copy boundary governance and existing-homepage copy updates only. No new public routes, upload, scoring, verdict, detector claims, public API, or automated report behavior is authorized.
